title: Remove Ibrahim from outer circle seats

log.context: Remove Ibrahim from outer circle seats

Done. Here's what was changed:

**File:** `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html` (lines ~1532–1553)

The `unseated.forEach` backfill loop was building an `ibrahimEntry` object and placing it into a seat slot whenever `hiring-manager` appeared as an unseated participant. The fix:

1. Filters `hiring-manager` out of the `unseated` array upfront (`.filter(id => !seatedIds.has(id) && id !== 'hiring-manager')`)
2. Removes the `isIbrahim`/`ibrahimEntry` construction entirely
